title: Claude 5.1 Confirmed: What Happens After The Fable 5 Ban?
summary: A YouTube video claiming Claude 5 (Fable) was banned 76 hours after launch following strong performance benchmarks and alleged capability throttling. The video speculates on government regulatory triggers and frames competitive claims about model performance across GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and DeepSeek V4.
writeup: The video claims Claude 5, referred to as Fable, was banned 76 hours after launch following strong benchmark results and alleged capability throttling. It speculates that government regulatory triggers drove the ban, and it frames competitive comparisons of model performance against GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and DeepSeek V4. Touching on test-time compute, SWE-Bench, model capability, AI safety, and model evaluation, the content is speculative and built on unverified claims rather than confirmed releases.
